tools.name: tavily_search
tools.description: Execute high-quality web search using Tavily API. Get comprehensive search results for latest information, news, and general topics.

searchDepth.description: Search depth. basic uses 1 credit, advanced uses 2 credits

topic.description: Search category. news for latest information, general for general search

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to retrieve (1-15)

timeRange.description: Time range filter (filter by past period)

includeDomains.description: List of domains to include in search

excludeDomains.description: List of domains to exclude from search

country.description: Prioritize results from specific country (e.g., japan, united states)

maxContentLength.description: Maximum character length per search result content (default: 5000, min: 500, max: 50000). Increase to retrieve more detailed content from each result.

tools.name: tavily_extract
tools.description: Extract content from specified URLs using Tavily API. Get webpage content as structured text.

urls.description: Array of URLs to extract content from (single URL should be passed as a 1-element array)

query.description: Query for reranking. When specified, prioritizes more relevant content

extractDepth.description: Extraction depth. basic: 1 credit/5 URLs, advanced: 2 credits/5 URLs

chunksPerSource.description: Number of chunks per source (1-5, only effective when query is specified)

maxContentLength.description: Maximum character length per extracted content (default: 20000, min: 1000, max: 100000). Increase to retrieve full page content.

tools.name: tavily_crawl
tools.description: Comprehensively crawl websites using Tavily API. Starting from specified root URL, automatically discovers and extracts related pages.

instructions.description: Crawl instructions (natural language). Specifying doubles the usage cost

maxDepth.description: Maximum exploration depth (1-5, how far from base URL)

maxBreadth.description: Maximum number of links per page (1 or more)

limit.description: Maximum number of links to process (1 or more)

selectPaths.description: Regex patterns for paths to include

selectDomains.description: Regex patterns for domains to include

excludePaths.description: Regex patterns for paths to exclude

excludeDomains.description: Regex patterns for domains to exclude

allowExternal.description: Whether to include external domain links in results

extractDepth.description: Extraction depth. basic: 1 credit/5 extractions, advanced: 2 credits/5 extractions

chunksPerSource.description: Number of chunks per source (1-5, only effective when instructions is specified)

maxContentLength.description: Maximum character length per crawled page content (default: 10000, min: 1000, max: 100000). Increase to retrieve more detailed content from each page.
